revision.text:
{{cmbox | type = notice | image = | text = This is a [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category listing]], which serves as an index of existing Wikipedia articles about {{{nationality|}}} recipients of the '''[[{{{award}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{period|}}}|{{sp}}{{{period|}}}}}.
It is not intended to be an exhaustive listing of all recipients. }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
{{cmbox | type = notice | image = | text = This is a [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category listing]], which serves as an index of existing Wikipedia articles about {{{nationality|}}} recipients of the '''[[{{{award}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{period|}}}|{{sp}}{{{period|}}}}}.
It is not intended to be an exhaustive listing of all recipients. }} {{documentation}}

{{cmbox | type = notice | image = | text = This is a [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category listing]], which serves as an index of existing Wikipedia articles about {{{nationality|}}} recipients of the '''[[{{{award}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{period|}}}|{{sp}}{{{period|}}}}}.
It is not intended to be an exhaustive listing of all recipients. }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.text:
{{cmbox | type = notice | image = | text = This is a [[Wikipedia:Categorization|category listing]], which serves as an index of existing Wikipedia articles about {{{nationality|}}} recipients of the '''[[{{{award}}}]]'''{{#if:{{{period|}}}|{{sp}}{{{period|}}}}}.
It is not intended to be an exhaustive listing of all recipients. }} {{documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
